source-discipline.reason: This attestation covers THIS session's change to the artifact: the status flip from PROPOSED to ACCEPTED under the owner's verbatim 2026-07-13 ratification directive, with the prior status preserved inline. The DR's substance originates from PR #2 (authored session_2026-07-12, validator check implemented alongside the policy); independent grounding this session: pilot cell C-02×DEM demonstrated the threshold on real data before ratification.
source-discipline.notes: Authored at ratification time because the originating PR merged with the attestation-presence check red (a known C3 gap, disclosed in the ratification package); this closes that gap for the ratified artifact.

bias_direction: An attestation authored by the ratifying session for another session's DR risks rubber-stamping content it did not produce. Bounded by: it attests only to the status flip and to the specific independent grounding named above; the DR's own revision history carries its authoring session's adversarial-review record.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer might argue the originating session should author its own attestation retroactively. Response: that session is closed; the ratification record is the operative event changing the artifact, and this attestation is scoped to exactly that event.
